text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer is here—an unforgettable season for us
both.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's right. That fateful event happened last
summer...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...What? I've been in bad health because I've
been taking on too much by myself?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry, Trainer! From here on out, we do
things together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek's health improved after we started
sharing responsibilities and became a true team.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And we've continued to grow closer ever since.
This year...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You look different somehow. Maybe it's because
you've gained a bit of muscle since last year?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
No, that's not the only reason. You've got a more
resolute look in your eye too...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: It kind of gives me mixed feelings. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh. Like, I want things to stay how they were,
but it also makes me happy.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But I don't think these changes will stop. Not in
you or in me—or in our relationship either.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm not afraid though. I believe we'll be okay no
matter how much we change.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Now then! How should we spend this
summer in preparation for the fall G1 races?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although we may be closer than ever, some things
just never change.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pledge to the blue skies above to race through
this once-in-a-lifetime summer without any
regrets.
